title: Entering the Home
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala Rabbina tawakkalna.
translation: In the Name of Allah we enter, in the Name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.

title: Leaving the Home
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
transliteration: Bismillah, tawakkaltu 'alallah, la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
translation: In the Name of Allah. I place my trust in Allah. There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

title: Entering the Toilet
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khaba'ith.
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the male and female devils.

title: Wearing New Clothes
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ، أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ
transliteration: Allahumma lakal-hamd, anta kasawtanihi, as'aluka min khayrihi wa khayri ma suni'a lah, wa a'udhu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ma suni'a lah.
translation: O Allah, all praise is Yours. You have clothed me with this garment. I ask You for its goodness and the goodness for which it was made, and I seek refuge in You from its evil and the evil for which it was made.

title: Looking in the Mirror
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
transliteration: Allahumma kama hassanta khalqi fahassin khuluqi.
translation: O Allah, just as You have made my appearance beautiful, make my character beautiful as well.

title: Supplication for Someone Wearing New Clothes
translation: May you wear it out completely, and may Allah grant you a replacement.
whenToRecite: To congratulate someone wearing new clothes.

title: Congratulations for Marriage
arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ، وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ، وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ
transliteration: Barakallahu laka, wa baraka 'alayka, wa jama'a baynakuma fi khayr.
translation: May Allah bless you, shower His blessings upon you, and unite you both in goodness.

title: Supplication for the Bridegroom
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهَا وَخَيْرِ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min khayriha wa khayri ma jabaltaha 'alayh, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma jabaltaha 'alayh.
translation: O Allah, I ask You for her goodness and the goodness You have created in her, and I seek refuge in You from her evil and the evil You have created in her.
whenToRecite: When entering upon one's spouse after marriage.

title: Supplication for Children
translation: My Lord, grant me righteous offspring.
whenToRecite: When asking Allah for righteous children.

title: Seeking Protection for Children
arabic: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ، مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
transliteration: U'idhukuma bi kalimatillahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammah, wa min kulli 'aynin lammah.
translation: I seek protection for you both in the perfect words of Allah from every devil, every harmful creature, and every evil eye.
whenToRecite: For children and loved ones seeking Allah's protection.

title: Congratulations on the Birth of a Child
arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي الْمَوْهُوبِ لَكَ، وَشَكَرْتَ الْوَاهِبَ، وَبَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ، وَرُزِقْتَ بِرَّهُ
transliteration: Barakallahu laka fil-mawhubi lak, wa shakartal-Wahib, wa balagha ashuddah, wa ruziqta birrah.
translation: May Allah bless you with the child He has given you. May you be grateful to the Giver, may the child reach maturity, and may you be blessed with their righteousness.
whenToRecite: Congratulating parents on the birth of a child.

title: Protection from the Evil Eye
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
whenToRecite: For protection from harm and the evil eye.

title: Supplication for Blessing
whenToRecite: When praying for blessings upon someone.

title: Supplication for Family
arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yun waj'alna lil-muttaqina imama.
translation: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us leaders for the righteous.
whenToRecite: When praying for one's spouse, children, and family.
